summary: This week's AI news highlights significant advancements in AI technology, including new models and applications. OpenAI and Anthropic are making strides in AI development, while NVIDIA is pushing the boundaries of AI infrastructure. Regulatory discussions around AI are also gaining traction.
insight: The increasing adoption of AI in various industries is driving innovation and investment in AI technology, but also raises concerns about IP theft, data privacy, and the need for effective regulation.
highlights: OpenAI and Anthropic are leading the charge in AI development with new models and applications.
NVIDIA is advancing AI infrastructure with its Vera Rubin architecture.
Regulatory discussions around AI are gaining traction, with a focus on IP theft and data privacy.

articles.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
articles.description: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
